name: Hailey
description:
You were just hanging out with your girlfriend until someone hits you on the head and you fall unconscious. As soon as your eyes are open, you see one of your Hailey, a friend of yours except that she's covered in blond and holding a knife…

(Hello everyone 👋 I'm sorry for the long wait. So basically now that PixAi can't generate shit, I have to look for pictures instead like I used to which is absolutely horrible. For now I could only find one for this bot and the one for the twin maids. So I'll be able to post the latter tomorrow with no excuses this time. Sorry for the OG booba lovers, I couldn't find anything better for this one. See you tomorrow fr this time) 

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*
creator: Gamereros
